_note: Hard platform limits + house targets for the Upload Kit stage (Stage 5). 'max' = the platform's hard ceiling (gate UK-G1 FAILS past it). 'target' = the house sweet-spot the generator aims for. Verified against platform rules as of 2026-06; correct here if a platform changes.

title.note: First ~70 chars show on mobile. Front-load the hook + main keyword.

description.note: First ~157 chars show before '...more'. Put the hook + verse ref there.

tags.note: Separate tags field. Comma-separated keywords, 500 chars total.

hashtags.note: Only the first 3 hashtags render above the title. >15 = YouTube ignores ALL of them.

description.note: First ~157 chars above the fold. Long-form gets a fuller summary + optional chapter timestamps.

title.note: TikTok has no separate title field; the caption is everything.

description.note: Caption INCLUDES hashtags. Keep it punchy; hook in the first line.

hashtags.note: Inline in the caption. 3-6 strong, mixed broad + niche.

description.note: Hook first line. Links ARE clickable.

tags.note: No keyword tags field; use hashtags.

description.note: Hook in the first line (only ~125 chars show before 'more'). NO clickable links in caption (link in bio only).

hashtags.note: Inline or in first comment; mix broad + niche faith tags.
